resultPayload.note: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.

evidence.error: Exploratory validation blocked: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
evidence.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of a unique link per meeting for security. While the linked use case describes the generation of a unique Zoom meeting link, it does not provide evidence that this functionality is consistently applied across all scenarios, nor does it confirm that links are not reused. This indicates a gap in the requirement coverage, as the evidence does not sufficiently demonstrate that the unique link requirement is satisfied in all relevant contexts.
gaps: No evidence confirming that unique links are generated for every meeting across all scenarios.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
